title: Random Size
description: Every now and then the player's height will change, which will add challenges to the game!
body:
## Description
Every now and then the player's height will change, which will add challenges to the game!

![preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/2NARGTHD/images/10a56c94d6ae6fe6356fa8e739f0bfa105724d6f.jpeg)

## Dependencies
- Fabric loader requires [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)
